description: Create guided flow to create agent, add sources, and deploy widget.

description: Deliver actions API endpoints plus initial CRM escalation, Slack notify, and Stripe billing executions.

title: Gap: multi-channel connectors (email, Slack, WhatsApp, Zendesk, Salesforce)
description: Gap not implemented yet. Why: Customers expect omnichannel coverage for support deflection and agent routing. Tests: Per-channel auth + webhook ingestion + message routing smoke tests with send/receive round trips.

title: Gap: analytics & observability dashboards
description: Delivered analytics + observability dashboards with metrics endpoints, dashboard UI, and conversation review. Tests: npm run test -w apps/api; npm run test -w apps/web.

title: Gap: GDPR controls, RBAC, audit logging
description: Delivered GDPR controls (deletion, retention), role-based access control, and audit logging with compliance-grade trails. Tests: apps/api/src/__tests__/api.spec.ts.

title: Generate Playwright visual snapshots
description: Blocked: Playwright/Chromium launch hangs in this environment (even chromium.launch). Attempts were interrupted/hung: npm run e2e -w apps/web -- --update-snapshots, single-test run, and npx playwright install chromium.

title: Fix Playwright SSR render harness for visual snapshots
description: New blocker discovered on 2026-02-27: Playwright launches successfully, but SSR helper fails in apps/web/tests/render-utils.ts at renderToString(createElement(App)) with 'Objects are not valid as a React child (keys {__pw_type,type,props,key})'. Why: this prevents visual baseline generation and blocks onboarding + visual snapshot coverage. Tests: unblock and run onboarding visual snapshots plus broader visual snapshot suite in apps/web e2e.

title: Apply GDPR retention on conversation listing
description: Fix /conversations list to enforce GDPR retention purge; with days=0 stale conversations remain visible, creating a compliance/privacy exposure. Evidence: apps/api/src/__tests__/api.spec.ts failing around line 1486 (expected 0 items, got 1).

title: Gap: tenant isolation on ingestion/retrieval endpoints
description: Enforce strict tenant scoping and authorization on ingestion and retrieval endpoints. Why: without tenant isolation checks, cross-tenant access can expose or mix customer data. Tests: add API integration tests that reject cross-tenant ingestion create/status and retrieval requests, plus positive same-tenant access cases.

title: Gap: auto-create CRM ticket on low-confidence escalation
description: Implement chat runtime low-confidence escalation path to create CRM ticket automatically with conversation context and idempotent dispatch safeguards.

title: Gap: extend connector webhook support (Messenger, Instagram, Shopify, Zapier, WordPress)
description: Implement webhook verification, payload normalization, and inbound routing for Messenger, Instagram, Shopify, Zapier, and WordPress connectors.

title: Implement Notion source integration with webhook handler and auto-retrain scheduler (AC5)
description: AC5 is the only acceptance criterion with zero implementation. Add Notion source ingestion, change webhook endpoint, auto-retrain scheduler stub, and tests.

title: GDPR vector chunk deletion - add delete methods to vector store and wire into GDPR deletion endpoint
description: AC7 gap: GDPR deletion removes conversations but not vector store chunks. Need to add deleteByAgentId/deleteBySourceId to LocalVectorStore, then call from GDPR handler and source deletion.

title: Source citation enrichment - include source URL/title in chat responses
description: AC2 gap: citations return chunk IDs but not human-readable source names/URLs. Enrich chat response sources with source name and URL from the sources Map.

title: Retrain logic - clear old chunks and re-ingest on retrain
description: AC1 gap: retrain endpoint only sets status flag. Should delete old chunks for source from vector store and create new ingestion job.

title: Stripe action - add realistic Stripe client pattern with SDK-like interface
description: AC6 gap: billing action returns hardcoded mock data. Create a StripeClient abstraction with create invoice/payment link methods that simulate real API patterns.

description: Review requirements in specs/chatbase-competitor-norway and document plan for next work item

title: Design decisions log
description: Capture any medium-confidence decisions for the objective in .ralph/agent/decisions.md with proper template.

title: UI primitives migration complete
description: Why: Standardize onboarding forms and badges on shared shadcn-style primitives and record 8starlabs registry usage. Tests: npm run test -w apps/web; npm run build. Implementation outcome: App.tsx now uses shared Button/Input/Select/Textarea/Badge components from apps/web/src/components/ui.

title: Onboarding auth-header blocker fix
description: Why: Playwright onboarding step 1 failed with `user_required` because web API client requests omitted `x-user-id`. Tests: npm run test -w apps/web; npm run build -w apps/web; Playwright CLI re-check advances onboarding to step 2 (only favicon 404 remains). Implementation outcome: Added `x-user-id` support in apps/web/src/api.ts, wired `VITE_API_USER_ID` default `user_admin` in apps/web/src/pages/App.tsx, and updated apps/web/src/pages/App.test.tsx to assert the header.

title: Fix API dev script ESM loader mismatch
description: Why: `npm run dev -w apps/api` failed with `Must use import to load ES Module` from ts-node-dev. Tests: `PORT=0 npm run dev -w apps/api`; `npm run test -w apps/api`. Implementation outcome: Replaced `ts-node-dev` with `tsx watch` in `apps/api/package.json` and updated dev dependencies.

title: Fix web favicon 404
description: Why: Frontend console showed a favicon 404 that added noise to debugging and onboarding validation. Tests: `npm run build -w apps/web`. Implementation outcome: Added `apps/web/public/favicon.svg` and linked it from `apps/web/index.html` with `<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" />`.

title: Plan coverage review complete
description: Coverage against specs/chatbase-competitor-norway/plan.md: API/shared fully implements steps 1,3,4,5,7,8; partial 2,6,9,10; missing 11,12. Web/ops fully implements 3,4,5; partial 1,2,6,7,8,9,10,11,12. Missing priorities logged: durable ingestion worker/queue runtime, CI lint/test/build + Playwright workflows, stronger API-backed onboarding E2E acceptance, persistence for metrics/audit/ingestion state, and beta acceptance automation/runbook completeness.

title: Implement durable ingestion worker queue runtime
description: Why: Ingestion lifecycle data could be lost on restart without durable runtime state. Tests: `npm run test -w apps/api`; `npm run build -w apps/api`. Implementation outcome: Added file-backed runtime persistence for ingestion jobs plus atomic writes and startup reload in apps/api.

title: Add CI workflows for quality and e2e gates
description: Add CI workflows that run lint/test/build across repo and Playwright checks for onboarding flows on PR/push to cover missing P1 ops automation.

title: Strengthen API-backed onboarding E2E acceptance
description: Why: Onboarding needed API-backed end-to-end assertions beyond visual/baseline checks. Tests: `npm run e2e -w apps/web -- tests/onboarding.spec.ts`; `npm run test -w apps/web`. Implementation outcome: Added deterministic Playwright onboarding flow that validates persisted tenant/agent/source/channel outcomes against API.

title: Persist metrics audit and ingestion state
description: Why: Metrics/audit/ingestion runtime state was previously in-memory and lost across restarts. Tests: `npm run test -w apps/api`; restart-survival coverage in `apps/api/src/__tests__/api.spec.ts`. Implementation outcome: Runtime state persistence now stores metric events, audit events, and ingestion jobs in durable `runtime-state.json` and reloads on server startup.

title: Complete beta acceptance automation runbooks
description: Deliver beta acceptance automation and runbook completeness with scripted checks, release gates, and operator documentation updates for P2 readiness.

title: Strengthen API-backed onboarding E2E
description: Run the onboarding UI against the API and assert tenant/agent/source/channel outcomes end-to-end with deterministic waits and persisted state checks. Tests: npm run e2e -w apps/web -- tests/onboarding.spec.ts; npm run test -w apps/web.

title: Implement durable API runtime
description: Implement file-backed durable runtime persistence for ingestion job lifecycle, metrics events/summary state, and audit events in apps/api with restart-survival test coverage.
